code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(content)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut last_was_newline = true
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(content, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      count = count + 1
      last_was_newline = true
    else
      last_was_newline = false
    end
  when None
    last_was_newline = last_was_newline
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not last_was_newline
  count = count + 1
end
print("lines=#{count}")
